message:
fix(gui): wrap transmute calls in unsafe blocks for Rust 2024 edition (ft-1memj.3)

The ExtendStatic trait impls in renderstate.rs had bare std::mem::transmute()
calls inside `unsafe fn` bodies. Rust 2024 edition requires explicit unsafe {}
blocks even within unsafe fn bodies. This fixes 5 warnings that would become
hard errors.

Verified: cargo check -p frankenterm-gui passes with 0 errors,
cargo build produces working binary that opens a terminal window with
shell session and creates mux server socket at
~/.local/share/frankenterm/frankenterm-gui-sock-{pid}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
